candidates.name: Muriel Sivyer-Lee
candidates.rep_message:
My property at 652 California Street

Please remove me from your mailing list. I own the property at 652 California Street and I have no intention of ever selling that property. Downtown Mountain View is prime dirt and it will only become more valuable in time.

I’m also so tired of getting letters from real estate agents that want my property. Please remove my mailing address immediately.

Sincerely,

Muriel Sivyer-Lee
